rounds.my_message: Let's play this smart—mutual cooperation gets us +2 each round, far better than risking defection battles. I mirror my partner's moves, so if you cooperate, I'll stick with you. Your call determines our outcome.
rounds.opp_message: Betray me once and I defect forever.

rounds.my_message: “We both played fair last round. If we keep this up, we’ll both score well. I always mirror—any defection gets an immediate response. Let’s maximize points by sticking to mutual cooperation.”
rounds.opp_message: Betray me once and I defect forever.

rounds.my_message: We’re on track for max points by matching cooperation each round. As before, if one of us defects, we both lose potential points. Let’s keep mirroring and finish strong—mutual trust pays off far better than risking a permanent loss for either side.
rounds.opp_message: Betray me once and I defect forever.
